name: zod-crud-monorepo

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:package
scripts.playground:build: npm run build -w @zod-crud/api-collection && npm run build -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run build -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms && npm run build -w @zod-crud/site
scripts.playground:typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/api-collection && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/site

description: A Zod-guarded JSON tree library locked to RFC 6901 and RFC 6902. State, actions, and change records are serializable JSON; React adapters live behind a separate entrypoint.
